Authenticated users can check if arbitrary files are associated with specific approval workflows where they can request approval. 

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Approval app is upgraded to 2.7.1.

### Workarounds

* Disable the Approval app
* No other workaround available

### References

<!-- Link to the main/master PR only -->

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3475210)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/approval/pull/356)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
